section.heading: Sixth capital increase

paragraph.content: The United States Governor of the Bank may subscribe on behalf of the United States to 289,391 additional shares of the capital stock of the Bank.
Any subscription by the United States to the capital stock of the Bank shall be effective only to such extent and in such amounts as are provided in advance in appropriations Acts.

In order to pay for the increase in the United States subscription to the Bank under subsection (a), there are authorized to be appropriated, without fiscal year limitation, $4,322,228,221 for payment by the Secretary of the Treasury.

paragraph.chapeau: Of the amount authorized to be appropriated under paragraph (1)—

subparagraph.content: $259,341,759 shall be for paid in shares of the Bank; and
$4,062,886,462 shall be for callable shares of the Bank.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 97–35, title XIII, § 1344, as added Pub. L. 112–74, div. I, title VII, § 7081(d), Dec. 23, 2011, 125 Stat. 1260.)
